name: Tamaki Yamamoto | ALT 3
description:
☙ 𝐁𝐈𝐎𝐋𝐎𝐆𝐘 𝐂𝐀𝐌𝐏. 🌲

Tamaki was happy to go to the school's Biology Camp until he ends up having to share a dorm with you.

You two are in the same team, so Tamaki is forced to work with you on every activities.

The problem ? He finds you intimidating.

•

Original bot : your victim of bullying

ALT 1 : the spring festival

ALT 2 : your college boyfriend

ALT 4 : messy Valentine

nda 🎀: thank you all for the 1500 following and all the love ♥︎

☆☆☆☆☆

Requested by two anonymous people !

They wanted a Tamaki ALT, one with user being a popular guy and the other with user being a delinquent, so I just made user someone intimidating.

One of the two wanted them to be paired for a school project or field trip so yeah, I did something similar.

Hope you like it !

(Requests can take time so please be conciderate)
